rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 31, 2014, line 1. PLAINTIFF 32 HERON-103 LLC's Motion To Compel Inspection Of Real Property Located At 32 Heron Street, San Francisco, Ca 94103 And Imposing Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition.
